mapper.sql: notice_id AS noticeId, notice_title AS noticeTitle, employee_id AS authorId, notice_status AS noticeStatus, is_important AS isImportant, notice_views AS noticeViews, created_at AS createdAt, publish_start_at AS publishStartAt, important_end_at AS importantEndAt
mapper.select: SELECT notice_id AS noticeId, notice_title AS noticeTitle, notice_content AS noticeContent, employee_id AS authorId, notice_status AS noticeStatus, is_important AS isImportant, notice_views AS noticeViews, created_at AS createdAt, publish_start_at AS publishStartAt, important_end_at AS importantEndAt FROM notice WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT notice_id AS noticeId, notice_title AS noticeTitle, notice_content AS noticeContent, created_at AS createdAt, important_end_at AS importantEndAt FROM notice WHERE is_important = 1 AND notice_status = 'POSTING' AND is_deleted = 0 AND (important_end_at IS NULL OR important_end_at > NOW()) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
